Package org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractAndroidCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create something on Android platforms.
    AbstractEdgeCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create decorations based on a collection of points.
    AbstractNodeCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create nodes.
    AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create decorations based on a collection of points.
    AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create objects based on the drawing of a rectangle.
    BitmapDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create bitmap boxes.
    EllipseDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create ellipses.
    PolygonDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create polylines.
    PolylineDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create polylines.
    RectangleDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create rectangles.
    TextDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create text boxes.
